hazard.summary: The retry middleware ignores the Retry-After header on HTTP 429 responses leading to retries firing at fixed intervals inside the provider's enforced cooldown window.
signals: No Retry-After header consulted in retry delay computation
Providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini) send Retry-After headers on 429 responses

constraints: Must respect the Retry-After header to avoid premature retry attempts
Avoid retrying during the cooldown period enforced by the server
knobs: Implement logic to parse and honor the Retry-After header
Adjust retry middleware delay to align with server-specified Retry-After duration
verification: Observe retry timings to ensure they do not occur before the Retry-After duration expires
Verify no retries occur within cooldown window on HTTP 429 responses with Retry-After header
